mapper.select: SELECT t.relation_id, t.relation_hash, t.relation_template_id, t.relation_template_name, t.relation_name, t.relation_type, t.relation_trigger, t.start_node_hash, t.end_node_hash, t.create_time, t.update_time, t.field_id, t.topic_id, t.article_id, t.sequence_id FROM ( SELECT *, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY relation_hash ORDER BY create_time ASC) AS rn FROM graph_relation WHERE article_id = #{articleId} ) t WHERE t.rn = 1

SELECT t.relation_id, t.relation_hash, t.relation_template_id, t.relation_template_name, t.relation_name, t.relation_type, t.relation_trigger, t.start_node_hash, t.end_node_hash, t.create_time, t.update_time, t.field_id, t.topic_id, t.article_id, t.sequence_id FROM ( SELECT *, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY relation_hash ORDER BY create_time ASC) AS rn FROM graph_relation WHERE topic_id = #{topicId} ) t WHERE t.rn = 1

SELECT t.relation_id, t.relation_hash, t.relation_template_id, t.relation_template_name, t.relation_name, t.relation_type, t.relation_trigger, t.start_node_hash, t.end_node_hash, t.create_time, t.update_time, t.field_id, t.topic_id, t.article_id, t.sequence_id FROM ( SELECT *, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY relation_hash ORDER BY create_time ASC) AS rn FROM graph_relation WHERE field_id = #{fieldId} ) t WHERE t.rn = 1
